overall.description: First-person perspective walking along a narrow dirt trail through tall grass at night in a video game environment. The scene is illuminated by a flashlight or light source, revealing dense vegetation and trees lining the path as the player approaches a rocky section.

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person view walking along a narrow dirt trail at night. Dense tall grass and vegetation line both sides of the path, with a prominent large tree trunk visible on the right. The scene is illuminated by a flashlight, casting shadows on the dirt path ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: curving trail with rocky obstacles ahead

events.description: cluster of rocks becomes visible on the path ahead in the distance

agents.ego_description: continuing along the trail as it curves slightly left, approaching the rocky section

entered.detail: group of light-colored rocks and stones sitting on the dirt path ahead
silhouette of distant trees visible beyond the clearing

segments.scene_description: As the path curves slightly to the left, the large tree on the right falls behind and a cluster of rocks comes into view on the trail ahead. The tall grass on the left moves closer to the camera while the vegetation on the right recedes into the mid-ground. The trail continues toward the distant tree line.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement along a narrow dirt trail at night that transitions from a wooded path into a rocky clearing. It begins with the camera advancing through dense tall grass and vegetation, with a flashlight casting sharp shadows across the dirt and illuminating a prominent large tree trunk on the right. As the path curves slightly to the left, the large tree falls behind and the vegetation on the right recedes into the mid-ground. The scene then shifts as the tall grass on the left presses closer to the camera, revealing a cluster of rocks emerging on the trail ahead. The movement finally carries the viewer forward toward a distant, dark tree line under the focused beam of light.
